markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 661. Protective Headgear for Motorcycle Operators & Passengers
##### § 661.004 — Authority of Peace Officer to Inspect Protective Headgear

Any peace officer may stop and detain a person who is a motorcycle operator or passenger to inspect the person’s protective headgear for compliance with the safety standards prescribed by the department.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Any peace officer may stop and detain a person who is a motorcycle operator or passenger to inspect the person’s protective headgear for compliance with the safety standards prescribed by the department.
